title: Shard Booster Timer - DONUT SMP
description: A DONUT SMP Fabric mod that adds a visible timer for the Shard Booster potion.
body:
A DONUT SMP mod that adds a visible timer for the Shard Booster potion effect in the vanilla effects panel. 

Automatically detects when you drink a Shard Booster and displays a 24-hour countdown.
Remembers your remaining time between play sessions.
